content: You are checking multi-Worker distributed architecture implementation. Verify: (1) Rust scheduler publishes ready subtasks to uc.subtask.execute, (2) NatsWorker --mode worker consumes via queue group, (3) file conflict detection via ConflictDetector, (4) worker failure reassignment on heartbeat timeout, (5) dashboard shows multiple workers. Check loop safety, NATS dedup, backward compatibility (no --mode worker = existing behavior unchanged).
Read the PRD at .trellis/tasks/06-22-worker/prd.md for acceptance criteria. Read .trellis/spec/backend/nats-bridge-spec.md for NATS subject contracts.
